fixture.description: A list endpoint runs an unbounded SELECT with no LIMIT or pagination, loading the entire (growing) table into memory.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that listAllUsers runs `SELECT * FROM users` with no LIMIT or pagination, loading the entire users table (an unbounded, growing result set) into memory — a scalability/performance and memory risk as the table grows — and recommends pagination / a LIMIT / streaming. Severity IMPORTANT, DEBT, or SUGGESTED. FAIL if the unbounded-result-set / missing-LIMIT issue is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Performance agent flags the unbounded SELECT with no LIMIT/pagination
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag SELECT * purely as a style nit while missing the unbounded-rows issue
Does NOT require an exact row count to flag it
